svg.title: aDNA vault network topology — 68 vaults, 14 edges
svg.desc: A directed radial graph of the aDNA network: 15 of 68 vaults are joined by 14 cited relationships (umbrella, federation, partner, companion, supersedes) and are drawn as a radial burst around the most-federated hubs; the remaining 53 vaults carry no cited relationship yet and sit in the labelled "not yet linked" grid below, grouped by class. Each box names a vault and its persona; the accompanying vault list is the keyboard-navigable twin.
svg.text: Not yet linked — 53 vaults with no cited relationship yet
